content: We can reframe unsupervised dense retrieval with Contriever as an intrinsically curious exploration agent over the latent space of all text documents, where contrastive pre-training acts like a curiosity-driven intrinsic reward mechanism that pushes the retriever to seek out and encode under-explored semantic patterns rather than just fitting annotated query-document pairs. This enables a hybrid curiosity-driven Contriever that dynamically updates its dense embeddings to prioritize under-retrieved semantic domains during open-ended information retrieval tasks.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
